name: Blueberry Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the colored peel from an orange and a lemon.
2. Combine the peel and water, heat to boiling, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Mash the blueberries in a large pot and add the peel mixture.
4. Discard any pith remaining from the orange and lemon.
5. Finely chop the flesh of the oranges and lemons and add it to the blueberry mixture.
6. Heat the mixture to boiling, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Stir in sugar until dissolved and bring to a rolling boil.
8. Stir in pectin and bring back to a rolling boil.
9. Boil hard for 1 minute.
10. Remove from heat and skim any residue.
11. Ladle into hot jars and seal.
12. Process the jars for 10 minutes.
Makes 3 3/2 pints.
